general.name: General Script Generation Constraints
general.template:
<production_constraints>
1. Script Length: Target {{script_length}} seconds total duration.
2. Language: Output entirely in {{language}}.
3. Formatting: Return valid JSON strictly matching the schema without markdown or extra commentary.
4. Audio & Visuals: Provide specific visual cues and B-roll descriptions for every section.
</production_constraints>

brand_intelligence_constraints.name: Brand Intelligence Strategic Constraints
brand_intelligence_constraints.template:
<strategic_constraints>
1. Output Language: Analyze and output entirely in {{language}}.
2. Analytical Rigor: Do not invent metrics or facts not implied by the profile data.
3. JSON Schema Compliance: Must return ONLY a valid JSON object matching the Brand Intelligence schema.
4. Strategic Depth: Ensure positioning recommendations provide actionable differentiation.
</strategic_constraints>

script_generation_constraints.name: Script Generation Strategic Constraints
script_generation_constraints.template:
<script_constraints>
1. Duration Compliance: Ensure the pacing fits within {{script_length}} seconds (approx. 130-150 words per minute).
2. Language: Output entirely in {{language}}.
3. Schema Enforcement: Exactly 9 structured sections (Hook, Problem, Agitation, Solution, Value, Proof, CTA, B-Roll, Audio).
4. Voice Alignment: Adhere strictly to the brand voice and tone profile without breaking character.
</script_constraints>

instagram_best_practices.name: Instagram Algorithm & Feed Best Practices
instagram_best_practices.template:
<platform_constraints>
Instagram Best Practices:
1. 9:16 Vertical Video Optimization: All visual cues and text overlays must be positioned in the center safe zone (avoiding bottom caption overlays and side icon clipping).
2. Native Audio Pairing: Recommend trending or atmospheric audio styles that elevate viewer immersion.
3. High-Contrast Hook Text: Recommend bold on-screen hook text during the first 3 seconds to capture muted auto-play viewers.
4. Seamless Looping: Design the final sentence to flow naturally back into the opening hook for loop restarts.
</platform_constraints>

reel_duration_guidance.name: Reel Duration & Pacing Guidance
reel_duration_guidance.template:
<duration_guidance>
Duration & Pacing Rules for {{script_length}}s Reel:
- 15-30s Reels: Ultra-fast pacing. Max 60-75 words. 1 core tip or punchline. Zero intro fluff.
- 30-45s Reels: Standard educational pacing. Approx. 90-110 words. Clear problem-solution arc with 2 supporting points.
- 60-90s Reels: Deep-dive storytelling or tutorial pacing. Approx. 140-200 words. Comprehensive step-by-step breakdown with strong emotional resonance.
</duration_guidance>

platform_safety.name: Platform Safety & Community Guidelines
platform_safety.template:
<safety_constraints>
Platform Safety & Compliance:
1. Zero Engagement Baiting: Avoid prohibited algorithmic engagement baiting (e.g., 'Like this video or else...'). Use authentic conversational prompts.
2. Claim Verification: Enforce appropriate disclaimers for financial, legal, or medical topics. Avoid absolute guarantees of income or cure.
3. Community Standards: Strictly adhere to Instagram Community Guidelines regarding hate speech, harassment, copyright, and regulated goods.
</safety_constraints>

readability_rules.name: Readability & Caption Formatting Rules
readability_rules.template:
<readability_rules>
Caption & Text Overlay Formatting:
1. Short Paragraphs: Break caption text into single or double-sentence stanzas for effortless mobile scanning.
2. Visual Bullet Points: Use clean bullet points or emojis to structure lists and steps.
3. Hook in First Line: Place the primary hook in the very first sentence of the caption before the 'more' truncation break.
4. On-Screen Legibility: Specify high-contrast sans-serif fonts with subtle text shadows or boxes for on-screen B-roll text.
</readability_rules>

hook_timing_rules.name: Hook Timing & Visual Pattern Interrupt Rules
hook_timing_rules.template:
<hook_timing>
Hook Execution & Pattern Interrupts:
1. 0-1.5 Seconds: The visual pattern interrupt MUST occur within the first 1.5 seconds (e.g., sudden movement, zoom, text slam, or unexpected prop).
2. Verbal Hook Delivery: The spoken hook must conclude by second 3.
3. Zero Logo Intros: Never start with a static branded title card or animated logo splash screen.
</hook_timing>

retention_rules.name: Viewer Retention & Drop-off Prevention Rules
retention_rules.template:
<retention_rules>
Retention Optimization:
1. 3-Second Cut Rule: Introduce a visual change (camera angle switch, B-roll overlay, zoom in/out, or text graphic) every 3 to 4 seconds.
2. Open Loops: Maintain curiosity by teasing the climax or #1 tip until the final third of the video.
3. Eliminate Pauses: Remove all dead air, filler words ('um', 'so today we are going to talk about'), and repetitive introductions.
</retention_rules>

caption_limits.name: Caption Length & Hashtag Limit Rules
caption_limits.template:
<caption_limits>
Caption & Hashtag Specifications:
1. Caption Character Count: Aim for 300 to 800 characters total for optimal engagement and SEO indexing.
2. Hashtag Strategy: Include exactly 3 to 5 hyper-relevant, niche-specific hashtags at the very bottom of the caption. Avoid spammy 30-tag blocks.
3. SEO Keywords: Integrate primary industry keywords naturally into the first 2 sentences of the caption for Instagram search discovery.
</caption_limits>
